=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:3-4:15) TS377095: `Effect.orElseSucceed` expresses the same recovery more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(catchToOrElseSucceed)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToOrElseSucceed for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToOrElseSucceed for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.orElseSucceed"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable catchToOrElseSucceed for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable catchToOrElseSucceed for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.orElseSucceed" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToOrElseSucceed_preview.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const program = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.orElseSucceed(() => 42)
)
